params.receiver: Contract that receives the funds and must repay.

returns.totalCollateralUSD: Total collateral value in USD (8 decimals).
returns.totalDebtUSD: Total debt value in USD (8 decimals).

params.assets: Array of reserve assets to mint for.

params.amount: Amount to repay (type(uint256).max for full debt).
Amount of underlying to withdraw (type(uint256).max for full balance).
Amount to withdraw (type(uint256).max for full balance).

acceptAdmin().notice: Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.         Must be called by the previously proposed admin.

borrow(address,uint256).notice: Borrow underlying asset against supplied collateral.

getBorrowIndex(address).notice: Get current borrow index for an asset (used by debtToken).

getLiquidityIndex(address).notice: Get current liquidity index for an asset (used by gToken).

getReserveData(address).notice: Get total deposited and borrowed for a reserve.

getUserAccountData(address).notice: Get a user's health factor and account data.

mintToTreasury(address[]).notice: Mint accrued protocol revenue to treasury as gTokens.

pendingAdmin().notice: Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).

setAdmin(address).notice: Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).         A typo or compromised key cannot brick the contract because the         proposed admin must explicitly call `acceptAdmin`.

supply(address,uint256).notice: Deposit underlying asset to earn interest (gTokens minted to caller).

supply(address,uint256,address).notice: Deposit underlying asset on behalf of another account (Aave V3-compatible).

treasury().notice: Treasury address (receives protocol revenue — should be UBIFeeSplitter)

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw underlying asset by burning gTokens (sent to caller).

withdraw(address,uint256,address).notice: Withdraw underlying asset to a specified recipient (Aave V3-compatible).

documentation.text:
@title GoodLendPool
 @notice Core lending pool for GoodLend — an Aave V3-inspired lending protocol
         where 33% of protocol revenue funds GoodDollar UBI.
 Features:
   - Supply / Withdraw (earn interest via gTokens)
   - Borrow / Repay (variable rate debt)
   - Liquidation (health factor < 1.0)
   - Flash Loans (0.09% fee)
   - UBI Fee Routing (33% of reserve factor → UBI pool)
 Architecture:
   - Per asset: GoodLendToken (gToken) + DebtToken + InterestRateModel
   - Single pool entry point (all reserves)
   - Oracle-based pricing for health factor calculation
   - Reserve factor → treasury → UBIFeeSplitter
@notice Price oracle
@notice Interest rate model
@notice Treasury address (receives protocol revenue — should be UBIFeeSplitter)
@notice Admin
@notice Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).
@notice Reentrancy guard

@dev Compute the amount of collateral to seize for a given debt repayment.
      Extracted from `liquidate` to reduce stack depth for forge coverage.

@notice Mint accrued protocol revenue to treasury as gTokens.
 @param assets Array of reserve assets to mint for.
@notice Get current liquidity index for an asset (used by gToken).
@notice Get current borrow index for an asset (used by debtToken).
@notice Get total deposited and borrowed for a reserve.

@notice Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.
         Must be called by the previously proposed admin.

@dev Updates liquidity and borrow indexes based on elapsed time.
      Accrues protocol revenue to treasury.
